heading: Step 2: Download the example application
body:
Clone or download the [example application](https://github.com//prisma/prisma-examples/tree/accelerate-nextjs-starter/typescript/rest-nextjs-api-routes) from the
[Prisma examples repository](https://github.com//prisma/prisma-examples/tree/latest).

This example is a simple blog content management platform that uses a SQLite database.
The following steps modify the application to use MongoDB instead of SQLite.
